abstract: Creates a sound classifier with a training dataset represented by a data source.

declaration.code: init(trainingData: MLSoundClassifier.DataSource, parameters: MLSoundClassifier.ModelParameters = ModelParameters()) throws

overview:
## Discussion

Use this initializer to train a sound classifier with an [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLSoundClassifier/DataSource]. For example, you can organize your audio files into labeled directories. See [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLSoundClassifier/DataSource/labeledDirectories(at:)].
title: init(trainingData:parameters:)
